name: Periodic Access Review
description: Performs a scheduled periodic access review across user accounts. A code node queries the IAM provider for all active users and their privilege levels. The playbook loops over each user, using Riggs AI to assess whether current privileges align with the user's role and responsibilities. Excess privileges are flagged, a Jira ticket is created for remediation, and the compliance team is notified on Slack with a summary of all findings.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query active directory for user accounts, roles, and privilege assignments

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for users with excess privileges

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance team with access review summary

config.description: Triggers on the first of each month to initiate periodic access review

config.query: SELECT u.user_id, u.email, u.department, u.role, u.last_login, GROUP_CONCAT(p.privilege_name) AS privileges FROM users u JOIN user_privileges p ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE u.status = 'active' GROUP BY u.user_id ORDER BY u.department
config.description: Query IAM provider for all active user accounts with their current privilege assignments
Iterate over each active user to evaluate privilege alignment

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate whether this user's current privileges are appropriate for their role and department. Flag any excess or dormant privileges that violate least-privilege principles.
config.description: AI-powered assessment of whether user privileges align with role requirements
Routes users with excess privileges to the remediation track
Create a Jira ticket to track remediation of excess privileges for this user

parameters.note: User {{current_user.email}} passed access review -- privileges aligned with role.

config.description: Record that this user's privileges are compliant with policy
Notify compliance team with a summary of the access review findings
Periodic access review complete -- all users evaluated, findings documented
